observations.summary: Aviel took three heavy shekels from his belt and offered them to Dan, with his hand trembling slightly.

evidence.quote: Aviel reached into his belt and pulled out three heavy shekels. He held them out to Dan, his hand shaking slightly.

observations.notes: The trembling hand suggests emotional or physical strain accompanying the act of giving.
